meaning: n.伤害,危害,故障,恶作剧,淘气,调皮的人,损害
examples: It's very quiet upstairs; they must be up to some mischief !
Her eyes were full of mischief.
I try to keep out of mischief.
On political oversight of tax-exempt groups, plenty of mischief can be made far from Washington.
My job guarantees I travel a lot, which leads to observation, adventure and mischief.
